privileged_info_summary: The task modifies a local, synthetically generated Jitsi Meet Docker deployment. The correct web configuration path is confirmed to be '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js'. To enforce the display name policy, the standard Jitsi configuration variable 'requireDisplayName' must be set to 'true', consistent with official Jitsi documentation. Furthermore, the required evidence screenshot path exactly matches the instructions and the export script logic at '/home/ga/evidence_disabled_button.png'.
